visual_description: The audio opens with a low, tense, and suspenseful musical score, creating a feeling of anticipation and danger. A close-up shot focuses on a person in a dark setting, looking through a pair of binoculars. The person's face is mostly obscured by shadow, but their hand gripping the binoculars is visible. In the dimly lit background, the profile of another person can be seen on the left. White Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed in the upper left corner of the screen. The camera cuts to a wider shot of a small boat on dark water at night. A man in dark clothing is in the foreground, leaning over the side of the boat. In the boat, several other people are seated, looking forward. The background is almost completely black, with a few distant, out-of-focus lights visible on the horizon. The white Chinese characters remain in the upper left corner. A sharp, metallic clank, like a heavy object being placed down, is heard, followed by a soft thud. The scene shifts to a close-up of a computer screen. The screen displays a "SMS (Short Message Service)" interface. The text is in both English and Chinese. The English text includes "Hong Kong (852)
